header: Blank page to published, in the time of a coffee break
subheadline: The everyday Desiderio workflow — four steps, zero developer tickets, every result on brand.

items.title: Open the content wizard
items.description: Pick from 255 elements sorted into ten groups, from Hero to Footers — the right block is seconds away.

items.title: Fill the guided fields
items.description: Content Blocks forms give every element sensible fields, hints, and limits — no raw HTML, no way to break the layout.

items.title: Check the backend preview
items.description: The page module renders a real preview of every element, so layout surprises end before publish — not after.

items.title: Publish on brand
items.description: The active theme preset styles the element automatically — accessible, token-driven, and pixel-consistent with the rest of the site.
